sentences.translation: Moja majka danas priprema mansaf za goste.
sentences.translationEn: My mother is preparing mansaf for the guests today.

sentences.arabic: تَطْبُخُ لَحْمَ الضَّأْنِ مَعَ اللَّبَنِ الْمُجَفَّفِ الَّذِي يُسَمَّى الْجَمِيدَ.
sentences.translation: Ona kuha janjetinu sa sušenim jogurtom koji se zove jameed.
sentences.translationEn: She cooks lamb with dried yogurt called jameed.

sentences.arabic: نُقَدِّمُ اللَّحْمَ فِي طَبَقٍ كَبِيرٍ مَعَ الْأُرْزِ وَالْمُكَسَّرَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Meso poslužujemo u velikoj posudi sa rižom i orašastim plodovima.
sentences.translationEn: We serve the meat in a large dish with rice and nuts.
